summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VidFlux AI video generation app. Backend APIs are functional, frontend UI works correctly, video generation flow is successful with proper integration between frontend and backend.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Individual project endpoint timing out, but background processing works
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use /api/videos endpoint to get project status instead

passed_tests: Home page loads correctly with all elements
Format selector modal opens and displays 6 formats
Category tabs filter formats correctly (informational, entertainment, commercial)
Format selection and modal closing works
Prompt input and generate button validation works
Complete video generation flow works end-to-end
Background video processing with LLM script generation active
Navigation from home page to video page successful

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor testid issue)

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Fix /api/video/{id} endpoint timeout issue - appears to hang on MongoDB query for individual projects
action_item_for_main_agent.suggestion: Check database connection and query optimization for single project lookups

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Add data-testid='video-page' to loading state in VideoPage component for better testability
action_item_for_main_agent.suggestion: Add testid to loading div in VideoPage.jsx around line 56
